item.title: Absolutely mind blowing
item.description: This kind of artistic skill will never not amaze me. Always wished I could do something like this, but I'm much more likely to severely injure myself permanently before ever reaching this level, for I am an uncoordinated klutz who routinely burns themselves on the oven door when baking. Sauce: https://www.instagram.com/reel/C7OdR93uqrg/
item.dc:creator: MizWeirdo

item.title: Glad nothing like this happens to humans. Right?
item.dc:creator: RedCamaro

item.title: Posion Ivy - Bride Cosplay
item.description:
Always proud of my Poison Ivy Bride Cosplay from the Harley Quinn Animated series. The hours it takes when I do body paint like this is insane, but always worth it. Even worth all the green splotches on walls and door handles and my camera equipment I have to wash later :P
Reference image!
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: It’s my birthday woo
item.description: It’s my birthday! A few days ago I did my own nails as a gift to myself but they only lasted 3 whole days lol (they were only meant to last a week as it is) and this was one thing I had to try out….I hated it to say the very least ? Looks so pretty for pictures but it’s just not functional for me. Mad props to the harpists out there I’ve seen with full acrylics! There’s another video with some REALLY self explanatory faces I’d made reacting some of the god awful clunky sound they were making against the strings. Playing harp with nails is usually a huge no no for techniques that aren’t based around the Hispanic style of playing. So not having the space to accommodate my finger tips and let the strings vibrate. Or else you get some…interesting sounds lol But I am hoping I’ll be able to post more from my birthday. When Imgur will let me Im not sure but we shall see what the day holds <3
item.dc:creator: SursieMetzger

item.dc:creator: imgureeeee

item.title: Meme Library: Volume 33
item.description:
Hello and welcome to another meme dump, my imgur friends. Your resident screeching bird woman is here to deliver another batch of funny stuff.
I have an approximate knowledge of many things
they're all good boys Bront
I still have no idea what I'm doing and I'm not sure if I ever will
Of course I would fall off and drift forever in the void of space
oh fuck
That one over there used to be a Radio Shack
Hell yeah. But remember, be aware of people's weapon preferences! Some people might like a sword, others a mace. I'm a dagger person myself.
Ahhh yes, makes perfect sense now
I usually go with a "hey guys" or "what's up my dudes"
and agains!
Oh man, after many years (and many colors) I have somehow resisted doing stupid shit to my hair for about 3 years now. It's almost down to my ass and I'm in awe at my newfound self control.
he a little confused, but he got the spirit
He's not wrong!
hello, fellow sun bears All right, that's all for this dump folks. Until next time, stay awesome
item.dc:creator: SecretHarpy

item.title: Images of Note: Don the robes.
item.description:
https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/articles/cpwwqp6nx14o
This is going to be me tomorrow.
Fuckin' kek
a device you say?
owo
Literally found this out on Lemmy and I just can't understand how you could defend Recall.
He'll be put into something like Gadaffi's Cafe.
I kinda wanna make an office.
It will???
:D
they sit next to each other on the bench and I ship them both.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also STREEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEM: http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: He's new to biscuit making, so he's still conservative with his technique
item.description: Our boy had it rough most of his life going between multiple houses, or being on the street. When we adopted him the foster parent said that we were his 5th family, because no one gave him enough time to warm up and be comfortable. It was July 2020 when we got him, and just a couple months ago he started his biscuit career
item.dc:creator: noticemesensei

item.title: The 439th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps
item.description:
This week I am promoting an online friend's Twitch Stream and Cat Surgery Fundraiser @ElbowDeepInPackages (Amazon shipments, not genitals) Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/erosrogziel She will be starting her streaming this week around 6-7 pm EST Game Schedule: Mon- Wild Card Day Tue- Stardew Valley Wed- Wild Card Day Thu- Risk Of Rain 2 Fri- Terraria Sat- Shellshock Earlier Times, varied: Sun- Valorant Fundraiser: 2 DAYS LEFT! https://www.paypal.com/pools/c/93Wy48Im0r The catto needs a semi-expensive tooth extraction, about $900 USD, more if they find more problems once it's removed. She's Currently at $1000 / $900 ! Thanks *especially* to the person that donated $455 If you want to keep donating in case of further complications, feel free!
These signs must be at all the Trump conventions
How dare you insult the Fae by comparing them to the filth of Impractical Jokers
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays.
The bears would pick these women over the man
HELL YEAH
Even tho I'm a CIS Male
@CodyBurkett?
@CeleryMan7
100% Fresh-Squeezed PyroDragon OC!
100% Fresh-Squeezed PyroDragon OC!
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah @SecretHarpy Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: Progress on my hand stitched patchwork skirt
item.description: It’s not perfect by any means, but it’s fun. It is entirely fashioned from scrap fabric I had on hand. I’m going to add pockets, beads to the yarn cord, and decorative patches. Also please forgive the bad lighting, for it’s past midnight where I am on this earth.
item.dc:creator: personalrandomgirlaccount
